summary: Completed testing of 10 new batch 2 minutes templates. All 31 templates now showing on /minutes/templates page. Backend API tests (12/12 passed) confirm all new template types generate correctly and PDF download works. Frontend forms verified for trust_amendment, power_of_attorney, trust_termination, real_estate_purchase, business_interest_acquisition, real_estate_lease, fiscal_year_election, tax_filing_authorization, emergency_ratification, and conflict_of_interest.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 31 total minutes templates now available. Batch 2 templates (10 new) include: trust_amendment, power_of_attorney, trust_termination, real_estate_purchase, business_interest_acquisition, real_estate_lease, fiscal_year_election, tax_filing_authorization, emergency_ratification, conflict_of_interest. All have backend content generators in /app/backend/routers/minutes.py and frontend forms in /app/frontend/src/pages/MinutesTemplateFormPage.js. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_batch2_templates.py covers all new templates.

templates_page_shows_31_templates.details: Templates page at /minutes/templates displays all 31 template cards (11 original + 10 batch 1 + 10 batch 2)

trust_amendment_form.details: Form renders with Amendment Type, Article/Section, Current Provision, Amended Provision fields. Generate Preview creates document successfully.

power_of_attorney_form.details: Form renders with Agent Name, Scope of Authority, Purpose, Expiration, Powers Granted fields.

trust_termination_form.details: Form renders with Termination Date, Final Accounting Due, Reason, Distribution Plan, Outstanding Obligations fields.

real_estate_purchase_form.details: Form renders with Property Address, Property Type, Purchase Price, Financing Method, Due Diligence Period, Purpose fields.

business_interest_acquisition_form.details: Form renders with Entity Name, Entity Type, Ownership Percentage, Purchase Price, Purpose, Due Diligence Status fields.

real_estate_lease_form.details: Form renders with Property Address, Tenant Name, Lease Term, Monthly Rent, Security Deposit, Permitted Use fields.

fiscal_year_election_form.details: Form renders with Fiscal Year End, Election Type, Effective Tax Year, Reason fields.

tax_filing_authorization_form.details: Form renders with Tax Year, Preparer Name, Returns to File, Filing Deadline, Extension Authorized fields.

emergency_ratification_form.details: Form renders with Emergency Type, Actions Taken, Trustee Acting, Cost Incurred, Outcome fields. Generate Preview works.

conflict_of_interest_form.details: Form renders with Trustee with Conflict, Type of Conflict, Description, Related Transaction, Disclosure Date, Waiver Granted fields.

pdf_generation.details: Download PDF button works. API endpoint /minutes-templates/{id}/pdf returns valid base64 PDF data.

backend_api_tests.details: 12/12 pytest tests passed covering all 10 new template types and PDF generation.
